issues: og:image tag absent — expected for a local dev tool

checks.name: og:title
checks.detail: Not present. N/A for local dev tool. If made public: add <meta property="og:title" content="포트 관리 프로그램" />.

checks.name: og:description
checks.detail: Not present. N/A for local dev tool. If made public: add a short description.

checks.name: og:image
checks.detail: Not present. N/A for local dev tool. If made public: create public/og-image.png (1200x630) and reference it with an absolute URL.

checks.name: og:url
checks.detail: Not present. N/A for local dev tool. If made public: add the canonical public URL.

checks.name: twitter:card
checks.detail: Not present. N/A for local dev tool. If made public: add <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />.

checks.name: PWA manifest.json
checks.detail: GET /manifest.json returns HTML fallback (no public/ directory exists — Vite SPA fallback). N/A for a Tauri desktop app. If a web version were published: create public/manifest.json with name, icons, display:standalone.

checks.name: Service worker
checks.detail: No service worker registration in index.html. N/A for local Tauri dev tool.

checks.name: Apple touch icon
checks.detail: GET /apple-touch-icon.png returns HTML fallback — asset does not exist. No <link rel="apple-touch-icon"> in HTML. N/A for local dev tool. If made public: add a 180x180 PNG to public/ and reference it in <head>.

checks.name: theme-color meta tag
checks.detail: theme-color meta tag absent. Low-effort improvement even for local use: add <meta name="theme-color" content="#0a0a0b" /> to index.html to match the app dark background.

checks.name: Favicon
checks.detail: GET /favicon.ico returns 404. GET /favicon.png returns HTML fallback (no real file). No <link rel="icon"> in <head>. A favicon is useful even for local tools — add public/favicon.ico or public/favicon.svg and link it in index.html.

issues.issue: No PWA manifest or service worker
issues.recommendation: Expected for a Tauri desktop app. If a web-hosted version is ever created: add manifest.json, 192x192 and 512x512 icons (purpose 'any' and 'maskable' as separate entries), display:standalone, and register a service worker.

gradeRationale: Local Tauri desktop dev tool — not a public website. All social-sharing and PWA checks are non-applicable by design. Grade is N/A rather than F. Two low-severity items (favicon, theme-color) are actionable regardless of deployment context.

recommendations.detail: Place favicon.ico or favicon.svg in portmanagement/public/ and add <link rel="icon" href="/favicon.ico" /> to index.html. Improves browser tab appearance during dev.
Add <meta name="theme-color" content="#0a0a0b" /> to index.html. Matches the dark UI and improves browser chrome appearance on mobile or when pinned.

Add og:title, og:description, og:url, og:image (1200x630 static PNG in public/), og:type, og:site_name to index.html. Required for KakaoTalk and SNS sharing thumbnails. Use a static PNG in public/ rather than a dynamic edge route to avoid content-length:0 caching bugs.
Create a 180x180 PNG at public/apple-touch-icon.png and add <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/apple-touch-icon.png" /> to <head>.

recommendations.action: Add PWA manifest and service worker
recommendations.detail: Create public/manifest.json with name, short_name, icons (192x192 + 512x512, purpose as separate 'any' and 'maskable' entries), display:standalone, theme_color, background_color. Register a service worker for offline support.
